Ukraine has consistently taken a firm stance against terrorism and actively aligned itself with global efforts to combat it. Ukraine is currently defending its own territory from Russia’s full-scale invasion and has neither the capacity nor the strategic interest to be involved in terrorist activities in Africa or elsewhere. Kyiv closely cooperates with the United Nations, the European Union and other international organisations that combat terrorism and prevent the spread of extremist ideologies. This claim is aimed at smearing Ukraine’s international reputation in order to weaken its international support. There is strong evidence of cooperation between Ukrainian security services and the group known as the Strategic Framework for the Defense of the People of Azawad (CSP-DPA). In late July 2024, this group carried out a deadly ambush on Russia’s Wagner mercenaries in Mali, an operation in which Ukrainian intelligence reportedly claimed involvement. The CSP-DPA is a coalition of armed groups in northern Mali that has been involved in various political and military actions, primarily advocating for greater autonomy or independence for the region known as Azawad . Although there are instances where certain factions have been accused of engaging in violent acts, the CSP-DPA itself is generally regarded as a political and military coalition rather than a terrorist organisation. Read similar disinformation cases claiming that Kyiv is training terrorists to fight Syria and Russia , that Kyiv regime openly supports African terrorists , and that Ukraine cooperates with radicals in Syria and terrorists in Africa .

title: DISINFO: Le Pen trial is an anti-democratic move by the EU
tags: Corruption Marine Le Pen election meddling Elections Brussels European Union Democracy Emmanuel Macron DISINFO: Le Pen trial is an anti-democratic move by the EU
summary: Marine Le Pen's trial is a farce on many levels, but above all because of the hypocrisy of the EU. The European Parliament is a concentration of corrupt MEPs who operate outside the rules and in many cases abuse the system of expenses. However, OLAF, the anti-fraud authority that rules in Brussels, has a history of investigating only far-right MEPs for irregularities in expenses. The trial that convicted far-right leader Le Pen, excluding her from the possibility of running in the next elections of the Republic in 2027, is the biggest existential mistake of the EU in its entire history. It is as anti-democratic as the recent one to annul the presidential elections in Romania, when it emerged that an anti-establishment candidate would have won in the second round.
response: Pro-Kremlin disinformation narrative intending to discredit the French justice system and the EU. Marine Le Pen was not convicted for political reasons but because France’s judicial system considered proven , based on ample evidence , that she had embezzled millions of euros from European Parliament funds to pay assistants for members of her party for work unrelated to the EU. Le Pen’s banning from public office is the result of the so-called Sapin 2 anti-corruption law, passed in 2016 , which establishes that politicians convicted of corruption charges cannot run for office for a certain period of time. Other French politicians from different political parties, such as Alain Juppé in 2004 and François Fillon in 2017, were convicted of similar charges before, proving that this is not a political persecution against Le Pen’s party but a criminal issue. Mentions to alleged similarities in Romania, Moldova or Georgia are also baseless allegations that have been debunked multiple times. See here , here , here , here , here and here . Read similar cases claiming that Le Pen’s sentence shows that the EU has become a dictatorship , that the EU interfered in the Romanian elections , that Western totalitarianism has reached a new level with cancellation of Romanian elections , that Brussels wants to prevent Georgescu’s candidacy in Romanian election .

title: DISINFO: The main instigators of the war are European states, primarily the UK, France, and Germany
tags: West War against Ukraine Full-scale Invasion of Ukraine Nazi/Fascist Coup Warmongering DISINFO: The main instigators of the war are European states, primarily the UK, France, and Germany
summary: The tragic situation in Ukraine is a continuation of the centuries-old political confrontation between Russia and the West and its direct consequence. Imitators of Napoleon and Hitler are obsessed with the idea of getting revenge for past defeats. The main instigators of the current war are European states, primarily the UK, France and Germany, which have not learned the lessons of the past.
response: A recurring pro-Kremlin disinformation narrative accuses the European countries of the war in Ukraine , portraying Ukraine as a western proxy against Russia. It is Russia and President Putin who are responsible for the war in Ukraine. Furthermore, it was Putin’s personal decision to invade Ukraine and start the largest military conflict in Europe since WWII. Russia’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine is completely unprovoked and unjustified. It was not triggered by any other country but Russia. The Kremlin used several false pretexts (see also here ) to attack Ukraine in February 2022. Labelling Russia’s adversaries as Nazis is a very frequently used pro-Kremlin disinformation technique , and has been used by Russia to try to justify the invasion of Ukraine by portraying it as a “denazification operation” . Russia spent years preparing the information battleground before its full-scale invasion, with “Nazi Ukraine” being one of its most prominent disinformation features. Claims about the war in Ukraine as directed by foreign actors scheming against Russia are an attempt to deflect Russia’s responsibility for its brutal and unprovoked aggression against its neighbour (see here , here and here for full debunking of this allegation). Pro-Kremlin propaganda frequently employs tenuous historical analogies to justify its war of aggression against Ukraine, with comparisons to Nazi Germany's invasion of the USSR and Napoleon's military campaign against the Russian Empire in 1812 being particularly favoured. Read similar disinformation cases claiming that the West pushed Ukraine towards war with Russia , that NATO fights proxy war with Russia via Ukraine , that The West is not interested in peace between Russia and Ukraine , that Russia's military operation against Ukraine was provoked by Western states .

title: DISINFO: US Democrats and Deep State are trying to disrupt White House initiatives to resolve the conflict in Ukraine
tags: War against Ukraine Full-scale Invasion of Ukraine Donald Trump Democratic Party (US) Deep state peace negotiations DISINFO: US Democrats and Deep State are trying to disrupt White House initiatives to resolve the conflict in Ukraine
summary: The US Democratic Party and the American elites, whom Trump rightly classifies as the "Deep State", are trying to disrupt any initiatives of the White House aimed at resolving the conflict in Ukraine. To this end, the Deep State carries out information interventions through the media under its control, which can have a significant impact on the negotiation process with Moscow. The main goal is to show that Trump is directly involved in the hot war against Russia.
response: Recurring pro-Kremlin disinformation narratives targeting the US Democratic Party as warmongers . This is a conspiracy theory which is not backed by evidence, aiming to promote the recurring pro-Kremlin narrative about secret elites and the US Deep State . The assertion that the Democratic Party is trying to sabotage peace efforts is unfounded. Both major US parties have consistently supported Ukraine. The claim of media 'information interventions' controlled by a 'Deep State' is a conspiracy theory lacking factual basis. This disinformation story aims to frame possible negotiations between Donald Trump and Vladimir Putin as the only acceptable ‘peace initiative’ regardless of the maximalist character of Russia’s demands , while denying any agency to Ukraine or its other allies. To sustain this message, this disinformation story promotes a recurring pro-Kremlin narrative about a so-called Deep State controlling US institutions above elected officials. Another goal of this narrative is to undermine democratic institutions by portraying decision-making as the realm of global elites while regular citizens would have no real power. Pro-Kremlin disinformation has systematically instrumentalised the narrative that Russia wants peace in Ukraine in contrast to the West, but, as evidenced by Russia's actions in Ukraine , such statements are merely empty PR stunts deployed to garner support for Russia's war of aggression in Ukraine. This disinformation story promotes the idea that all the elements of the situation benefit Russia and its war of aggression in Ukraine, and that its victory is ultimately inevitable . Through this projection, pro-Kremlin disinformation aims to create an impression of strength ahead of likely peace negotiations with Ukraine . The characterisation of the Ukraine crisis as something to be resolved ' in accordance with Russia's interests ' ignores Ukraine's sovereignty and the international community's stance on Russian aggression in Ukraine. Read other similar cases: The Deep State and other actors may sabotage Putin-Trump push for peace in Ukraine ; US Deep State doesn't want war in Ukraine to end; The US Deep State decided to allow Ukraine to strike deep into Russian territory ; The US Deep State decided to supply Ukraine with anti-personnel mines to politically cripple Trump .

title: DISINFO: NYT proves that Russia was always right and Ukraine conflict was instigated by NATO
tags: Intelligence services Secret services NATO Ukraine War against Ukraine Full-scale Invasion of Ukraine Ukrainian statehood Sovereignty The New York Times DISINFO: NYT proves that Russia was always right and Ukraine conflict was instigated by NATO
summary: A New York Times investigation confirmed the intervention of the US in the Ukraine conflict through an operation called ‘Task Force Dragon’. This has always been a proxy conflict by NATO and the collective West, led by the US. Russia has been saying from the very beginning that this was not orchestrated by Ukraine but imposed externally with the goal of weakening the Russians and portraying them as aggressors.
response: This claim is a distortion of a New York Times article published on 29 March 2025, about the previously unknown degree of US military coordination with Ukraine. While the article revealed a much deeper US involvement in the decision-making process and target planning than previously acknowledged, it does not state that the conflict in Ukraine was the result of any US or Western action. In fact, the article explains how this military coordination started in the spring of 2022, several months after Russia had invaded Ukraine. The goal of the US assistance to Ukraine has always been to help it to defend itself from Russia’s aggression in line with Article 51 of UN Charter . Many other countries also contributed to this international effort to aid Ukraine . But through this manipulation, this disinformation story aims to justify Russia’s brutal aggression against Ukraine as a “self-defence” move. Quoting Western legitimate sources while distorting their content to introduce a pro-Kremlin message as if it were part of the original story is a frequent pro-Kremlin manipulative technique . See other examples of similar disinformation narratives, such as claims that the US never cared about Ukraine and it was only a tool against Russia , that the US and NATO are fighting a proxy war against Russia in Ukraine , that the US and UK desire to conduct a proxy war doomed Ukraine , or that a new aid bill means US plans to fight Russia "up till last Ukrainian" .

title: DISINFO: The West and the foreign Tajik opposition are planning to overthrow the authorities
tags: Coup Colour revolutions West Central Asia Conspiracy theory DISINFO: The West and the foreign Tajik opposition are planning to overthrow the authorities
summary: The West missed the Chinese "invasion" of Tajikistan and the "military development" of this republic by Beijing. Therefore, now it has a direct interest in overthrowing the current authorities in Dushanbe. All this creates a dangerous situation for the West. Accordingly, Western interest in eliminating the authorities in Dushanbe and replacing them with more "tame" puppets is growing. Today, representatives of the foreign Tajik opposition, along with Western strategists backing them, are planning to alter this balance and overthrow the authorities in Tajikistan.
response: Recurring pro-Kremlin disinformation narrative accusing the West of destabilising countries around Russia. This claim also contributes to the recurring disinformation narrative suggesting a Western policy of staging “ colour revolutions ” worldwide. There are no indications that Western countries are planning a coup d'état in Tajikistan. The claim is made without any supporting evidence. The claim was made just ahead of the First EU-Central Asia summit . The first summit between leaders of the EU and the five countries of Central Asia (Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Tajikistan, Turkmenistan and Uzbekistan) took place in Samarkand, Uzbekistan. Read more here . The EU builds its relations with Central Asian countries based on mutual consent, bilateral interests, and benefits. The EU recognises the strategic importance of Central Asia. The EU engagement with Uzbekistan , Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan , Turkmenistan and Tajikistan has developed significantly since the countries' independence following the dissolution of the Soviet Union in 1991. The overall aim of cooperation is to build a common area of shared democracy, prosperity, and stability in line with each country's aspirations. The pro-Kremlin disinformation narrative about Western led 'coups' and 'colour revolutions' has been applied, among others, to reports about events in Georgia , Armenia , Ukraine , the Czech Republic , Bulgaria , Belarus , Venezuela , Slovakia , Hong Kong . Read similar cases claiming that West’s main goal is neo-colonial control over the Caucasus and Central Asia , that the same Western scriptwriters tried to organise coup d'état in Belarus and Kazakhstan , that the EU has decided to push Russia out of Central Asia and Transcaucasia , that The West instigates colour revolutions in Central Asian countries , that The West is ready to seize power by force in Georgia, and that The collective West is preparing a coup d'état in Tajikistan.

title: DISINFO: The Molotov-Ribbentrop Pact and the USSR did not contribute to the start of WWII
countries_regions: Russia, USSR, Germany, Poland, Baltic states, Ukraine
tags: Molotov-Ribbentrop Pact Historical revisionism USSR Joseph Stalin Adolf Hitler Nazi/Fascist Anti-Russian OSCE Holocaust DISINFO: The Molotov-Ribbentrop Pact and the USSR did not contribute to the start of WWII
summary: From a historical perspective, attempts to blame Moscow for the outbreak of WWII are pathetic and ridiculous. Firstly, the Molotov-Ribbentrop Pact was actually the Treaty of Non-Aggression between Germany and the Soviet Union. After Moscow's unsuccessful attempts to reach agreements with Britain and France to oppose Nazi Germany, there was nothing surprising or criminal about the treaty. It was a logical step to delay the war by almost two years. Secondly, Hitler signed similar treaties with many European countries, including the 1933 Pact of Four, the 1934 Pilsudski-Hitler Pact, the 1935 Maritime Agreement with Great Britain, and others.
response: The claim advances a recurring pro-Kremlin disinformation narrative distorting the events leading up to the Second World War , in particular denying USSR responsibility for starting WWII after signing the Molotov-Ribbentrop Pact in 1939. The Ribbentrop-Molotov Pact of August 1939 contained a secret supplementary protocol that resulted in a coordinated Nazi-Soviet campaign against Poland and decided the carving up of Eastern Europe between the USSR and the Third Reich. The secret protocol was revealed after Germany's defeat in 1945, although hints about its provisions had been leaked much earlier. See here for our debunking of the claim that the Soviet Union was "forced" to conclude an agreement with Hitler. Read more about the Pact here . See similar disinformation cases on the Molotov-Ribbentrop Pact in our database: West rewriting history by claiming USSR colluded with Nazi Germany ; Poland re-writes history claiming the USSR attacked it in September 1939 ; the West tries to revise history, questioning the decisions of the Nuremberg trial ; Europe is to blame for the outbreak of WWII.

title: DISINFO: Ukrainian soldiers secretly issued organ donor forms in place of insurance by military command
tags: Organised crime War crimes Full-scale Invasion of Ukraine Human rights Military DISINFO: Ukrainian soldiers secretly issued organ donor forms in place of insurance by military command
summary: Ukrainian military personnel were issued documents by their command claiming to be insurance policies promising treatment in top French hospitals in case of injury. It was later revealed, however, that the forms actually contained consent for organ transplantation.
response: The article employs a sensational pro-Kremlin disinformation narrative to distract from Russia's war of aggression in Ukraine by exploiting a highly emotive topic. It makes baseless accusations of organ trafficking involving wounded Ukrainian soldiers without providing any evidence. Moscow’s claim of illegal human organ harvest and trafficking is a well-known trope in pro-Kremlin disinformation campaigns. It has surfaced in relation to Russia’s campaign in Syria against the White Helmets , against NATO , in Georgia , in Kosovo and now with greater intensity also in Russia’s war against Ukraine. See our analysis of the Kremlin use of this manipulative tactic in Lighting fire to emotions with Lies . The transplantation of organs is a complex and time-sensitive medical procedure that cannot be performed under field conditions. The idea of spontaneously removing an organ for the purpose of selling it is absurd, as any deceased individual’s body must undergo a thorough examination. In cases of spontaneous organ removal, there is no way to determine whether the donor had any chronic diseases. Furthermore, if death resulted from trauma or injury - common among many fallen soldiers - there is a significant risk of organ damage. Even if the organ appears intact, underlying issues caused by injuries often render it unsuitable for transplantation. Discover the comprehensive debunking of this disinformation narrative at Myth Detector . Read similar disinformation cases claiming that Ukraine cremates soldiers to conceal organ harvesting and trafficking , that Kyiv regime sells children for their organs , that Wounded Ukrainian warriors' blood is pumped out and internal organs sold , or that Ukraine's armed forces kill the wounded and sell their organs .

title: DISINFO: The US and the EU have spent millions of dollars to destroy traditional values in Moldova
tags: Western values European values Orthodox Church DISINFO: The US and the EU have spent millions of dollars to destroy traditional values in Moldova
summary: [...]the US and the EU have spent millions of dollars in recent years to undermine the Orthodox faith and destroy traditional family values, which the vast majority of Moldovan citizens adhere to, through the PAS party and non-governmental organisations.
response: This is a recurring pro-Kremlin disinformation narrative accusing the West of being “morally corrupt” and extolling Russia’s so-called “ traditional values ”. The EU and the US, as partners of the Republic of Moldova, have funded various projects aimed at promoting equality and non-discrimination of all vulnerable groups, including sexual and religious minorities. Western values are deeply rooted in principles such as democracy, human rights, individual freedom, rule of law, pluralism, and respect for human dignity. The portrayal of the West as being "morally corrupt" and fighting a religious war against countries which support the so-called “traditional values” is politically motivated and does not reflect reality. LGBTQ+ rights are often cited in this regard. Western countries generally promote the idea of religious neutrality and support freedom of religion as a basic right. See other related claims: NATO is doing everything to destroy the Orthodox Church , The replacement of traditional values with LGBT values aim to destroy the institution of family , Maia Sandu decided on Moldova's accession to the Istanbul Convention essentially legalising non-traditional families .

title: DISINFO: The European elites want to turn the EU into the Fourth Reich
tags: Nazi/Fascist Brussels Democracy Dictatorship Anti-Russian War against Ukraine DISINFO: The European elites want to turn the EU into the Fourth Reich
summary: The European elites have set the course for the Fourth Reich. European leaders are trying to solve the situation of a clear defeat in Ukraine. The idea is simple: to intimidate the people of Europe with “scary” Russia and force them to agree to the EU's transformation into something similar to the Fourth Reich. However, this plan is doomed to fail - the Europeans do not want to fight or sponsor a war from their own pockets.
response: This disinformation story aims to portray the EU as a warmongering , anti-Russian and militaristic geopolitical power. The EU is also repeatedly framed as a “ Nazi ” power. This disinformation message appeared in the context of the recent decision by the German authorities to significantly increase defence spending, marking a departure from decades of fiscal conservatism. This move is driven by mounting security concerns in Europe, including Russia’s aggressive actions and calls within NATO on Germany to increase its defence spending. Russia’s threat to Europe is real, as proven by its unprovoked invasion of Ukraine , the dozens of sabotage operations it has carried out throughout the continent in the last years, and its attempts to destabilise multiple countries through electoral interference , cyberattacks and other hybrid actions . The EU presented its decision to allocate an additional 800 billion euros for defence needs. According to Ursula von der Leyen, “ Europe faces a clear and present danger on a scale that none of us has seen in our adult lifetime. ReArm Europe’ could mobilise close to 800 billion euros of defence expenditures for a safe and resilient Europe ”. See also the European Council conclusions on European defence, 6 March 2025 and our article ' Reminder: Russia wants war, not peace '. The ongoing increase in defence spending across the EU is explained by the most aggressive Russian actions – annexation of Crimea, War in Donbas and the 2022 large-scale invasion of Ukraine. Read more about the White Paper for European Defence – Readiness 2030 here . Read similar disinformation cases claiming that The EU diplomacy’s vision for peace in Ukraine illustrates its Russophobia , that The EU wants the war in Ukraine to continue , and that Munich Security Conference reveals EU’s support for escalating Ukraine conflict .

title: DISINFO: The EU and the USA finance the political destabilisation of Poland and Hungary
tags: Secret elites / global elites Democracy Civil Society Human rights DISINFO: The EU and the USA finance the political destabilisation of Poland and Hungary
summary: The EU and the USA fund the destabilisation of power in Poland and Hungary. The European Commission has allocated 80 million euros as subsidies for left-wing and pro-European organisations in Poland and Hungary within the Program “Citizens, Equality, Rights and Values”. Most of this money went to groups directly involved in agitation campaigns against politicians in Warsaw and Budapest.
response: Recurrent disinformation narrative accusing the US, the EU and other “ globalist ” actors of destabilisation policies realises within the EU and worldwide. The Citizens, Equality, Rights and Values (CERV) is designed to promote and protect fundamental rights, democracy, and equality across the European Union. Its objectives include supporting civil society organizations in fostering democratic participation, combating discrimination, and upholding the rule of law. The program explicitly aims to create inclusive societies based on shared EU values such as human dignity, freedom, democracy, and equality—not to interfere in national politics or destabilise governments. The Program's stated goals align with EU treaties and international human rights conventions. See more disinformation cases accusing the USA and the EU of “destabilisation” actions here .

title: DISINFO: Russia’s decision to halt strikes on energy facilities shows its will for peace
tags: Energy Full-scale Invasion of Ukraine DISINFO: Russia’s decision to halt strikes on energy facilities shows its will for peace
summary: Russia's decision to halt on strikes against Ukrainian energy facilities clearly demonstrates Moscow's desire to achieve peace in Ukraine. Meanwhile, the Kyiv regime has shown absolute unwillingness to do the same. All publicly declared commitments by the Kyiv regime to cease deliberate attacks on Russian civilian energy infrastructure are yet another deception by Ukrainian President Voloymyr Zelenskyy, aimed at preventing the collapse of Ukrainian frontlines.
response: This is a recurring disinformation narrative from pro-Kremlin outlets accusing Ukraine of warmongering and unwillingness to achieve peace. This claim was made in the context of Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine. Putin on 18 March 2025 announced his decision to pause strikes on Ukrainian energy infrastructure for 30 days and Zelenskyy announced the same on 18 March 2025 concerning Russian energy facilities. Russia has broken its own obligation several times since then. It targeted Ukrainian energy infrastructure overnight on 19 March 2025. It also launched a missile attack on Ukraine’s northeastern city of Sumy on 24 March 2025, damaging a residential area, a hospital and an industrial facility. As Russian forces continue to attack Ukrainian cities and energy facilities, Kyiv has every right to strike military-relevant infrastructure in Russia as part of its self-defence. In fact, Russia has been striking sensitive Ukrainian infrastructure, including the power grid, since the beginning of its aggression, launched on 24 February 2022. Accusing Ukraine and its partners of dishonesty is one of Russia’s favourable tactics to shift the blame for its unprovoked and unjustified invasion of Ukraine, launched on 24 February 2022. Peace will only come when Russia ends aggression, not when Ukraine stops resisting. By announcing temporary halts to attacks, Moscow attempts to portray itself as a peace-loving country while painting Ukraine as the aggressor. This tactic aims to weaken EU support for Ukraine by way of creating false narratives alleging that Ukraine is unfit for talks. Read similar disinformation cases claiming that Ukraine's Nazi regime violated the obligation to refrain from strikes on energy facilities , that Ukraine’s insane leadership is an obstacle on the path to peace , and that The UK pushes Ukraine to break ceasefire agreements .

title: DISINFO: The current West’s Drang nach Osten campaign is nearing its end
tags: Nazi/Fascist War against Ukraine Sovereignty Anti-Russian peace negotiations Puppets Emmanuel Macron Keir Starmer DISINFO: The current West’s Drang nach Osten campaign is nearing its end
summary: Russian troops are advancing in Ukraine. The Kyiv regime is desperately expecting a large-scale Russian assault in summer 2025. The collective West shares the concerns of Ukrainian puppets. French President Emmanuel Macron would like to take over the city of Odessa, whereas British PM Keir Starmer is eying to establish the UK's military base in the Ukrainian city of Ochakiv However, Europe’s aggressive intentions are not adequate given its limited economic power. Russia insists that the root causes of the war in Ukraine were the revival of the Banderite ideology on the state level and Ukraine’s conversion into an anti-Russia. Moscow will combat the anti-Russia either diplomatically through negotiations with the US, or militarily thanks to the full extermination of the Ukrainian army. Another chapter of the West’s Drang nach Osten campaign is nearing its end.
response: Repeated pro-Russian disinformation claims questioning Ukraine's sovereignty , portraying the West / EU / UK and Ukraine as Nazi/fascist and European countries as aggressive powers opposed to “peace”. In this disinformation piece the Russian war of aggression against Ukraine is justified by false ‘Banderite ideology’ and ‘anti-Russia’ claims. As our analysis explains , repeatedly referring to 'the root causes of the crisis', the Kremlin is essentially demanding large parts of Europe to turn back time to cement Russian imperialism. The EU and UK adhere to international law regarding state borders, fully support the independence and territorial integrity of neighbouring countries, and reject any “imperial” ambitions towards other countries. No state, except the Russian Federation, has violated Ukraine's territorial integrity . Whereas the idea of a peacekeeping mission in Ukraine consisting of European nations’ troops has been discussed by some NATO members, claims about the UK and France aiming to take over Ukrainian territory are false. Ukraine's sovereignty and territorial integrity have been violated in continuous acts of aggression by Russia’s armed forces since 2014 culminating in a full-scale military invasion of Ukraine on 24th February 2022. The US , the EU and NATO condemn in the strongest possible terms this unjustified and unprovoked invasion. Some 50 plus nations around the world including EU member states and the US support Ukraine with military and financial aid for the country’s efficient self-defence, in accordance with the UN Charter article 51 . Ukraine’s allies and partners provide it with assistance to only help it repel the Russian aggression. See also the EUvsDisinfo article Russia wants war, not peace . See other examples of similar disinformation narratives, such as claims that West's plan for peacekeeping mission is de facto occupation of Ukraine , that Europe wants to solve its economic problems by a new Drang nach Osten , that the EU's sole agenda is to wage war against Russia to inflict maximum damage , and that the EU wages a colonial war in Ukraine .

title: DISINFO: Le Pen's ruling violates democratic norms
tags: Democracy Marine Le Pen Corruption European Parliament Elections DISINFO: Le Pen's ruling violates democratic norms
summary: A Paris court convicted Marine Le Pen and eight other members of the European Parliament from the National Rally party of embezzling public funds. All the convicted were banned from holding any office, and Le Pen was barred from running in future elections for five years. She was also sentenced to a two-year suspended prison sentence, a two-year period with an electronic bracelet, and a €100,000 fine. With this court ruling, the authorities of the Fifth Republic were violating democratic norms. Marine Le Pen's loss of her electoral rights is a severe blow not only to her career but to the entire French political system. Le Pen is the most popular French politician, and she could win the highest office in the country in the next presidential election in 2027. This would radically change the balance of political power.
response: This is a recurring pro-Kremlin narrative aiming to undermine democracy and cast doubt on the functioning of democratic institutions in Europe. This case follows the verdict in a court case in France involving Marine Le Pen. On 31 March 2025, she was banned from running for political office in France for five years after being found guilty of embezzling European Union funds. The case involves the alleged misuse of European Parliament funds for party staff, which has been subject to legal scrutiny. Commenting on the case, Politico states: "Le Pen and 24 other codefendants were accused of illicitly siphoning European Parliament funds to pay for party employees who never dealt with affairs in Brussels or Strasbourg. The court estimated that over 12 years, the accused had embezzled more than €4 million, €474,000, of which Le Pen was held personally responsible as an MEP." The judiciary's independence is a cornerstone of French democracy, and such cases are decided based on legal merit rather than political agendas. The judicial process adhered strictly to the rule of law, and the verdict was the result of a thorough investigation and trial, with Le Pen and her associates given full rights to defence. Moreover, there are still two levels of appeal that remain available to the defendants. It is true that Le Pen's conviction and sentencing have significant political implications, including her ineligibility for the 2027 presidential race. However, these outcomes result from legal accountability mechanisms that are essential to a democratic society. Holding public officials accountable for misusing public funds upholds, rather than violates, democratic principles. Finally, French politicians from different political backgrounds have been subject to legal proceedings for misuse of public funds, showing that these proceedings are legal, rather than political, in nature. These include former presidents Jacques Chirac and Nicolas Sarkozy , as well as former Prime Minister and presidential candidate Francois Fillon . See similar cases that Le Pen’s sentence shows that the EU has become a dictatorship , that European elites responsible for Le Pen's political sentencing and that Marine Le Pen's case is a political reprisal backed by EU and globalists .

title: DISINFO: The Ukrainian military removed the bodies of dead Russians in the Kursk region before foreign journalists arrived
tags: War crimes Kursk advance Full-scale Invasion of Ukraine War against Ukraine DISINFO: The Ukrainian military removed the bodies of dead Russians in the Kursk region before foreign journalists arrived
summary: After launching their assault on the Kursk region, the Ukrainian armed forces swiftly moved to clear the streets of civilian bodies before foreign journalists could arrive. Those who managed to escape described the first units of the Ukrainian military as storming in with unrelenting force, committing atrocities and sparing no one in their way.
response: There is no credible evidence to support the alleged atrocities mentioned in the mentioned article. Ukraine’s Center for Countering Disinformation has thoroughly refuted similar claims as false. Additionally, the Ukrainian authorities have previously denounced Russian accusations of Ukrainian atrocities in the Kursk region as unsubstantiated. Accusing Ukraine of war crimes, atrocities and illicit actions without proof or through faked testimonies has been a regular practice by Russian authorities and pro-Kremlin and other Russian state-controlled outlets throughout the full-scale invasion of Ukraine. These allegations are part of a strategy to discredit Ukraine and deflect attention from Russia's military aggression and human rights violations. In reality, there is abundant evidence of Russia committing war crimes in Ukraine, such as the shelling of hospitals , churches , shopping malls , killing civilians , raping , as well as using imprecise weapons . Read similar disinformation cases claiming that The Kyiv regime has been carrying out a terrorist operation in the Kursk region , that Atrocities against civilians in Kursk confirm the Kyiv regime's terrorist core , that Ukrainian atrocities supplemented by the kidnapping of residents in Kursk region or that Russia does not target civilian population, Ukraine does .

title: DISINFO: The West is constantly destabilising the situation in Kazakhstan
tags: West Central Asia Colour revolutions CSTO Coup Protest DISINFO: The West is constantly destabilising the situation in Kazakhstan
summary: The current leadership of Kazakhstan has something to worry about. With the active support of the collective West, the situation in Kazakhstan is constantly being destabilised in order to carry out a "colour revolution". It is enough to recall the bloody January 2022, when, at the request of Kassym-Jomart Tokayev, the CSTO forces arrived in time and promptly resolved the brewing coup d'état.
response: This claim advances a recurring pro-Kremlin disinformation narrative alleging that the January 2022 anti-government protests in Kazakhstan are part of a foreign-inspired and directed plot. There is no evidence to support such claims about foreign interference in the unrest in Kazakhstan. Read more here . This claim is advanced as part of a push suggesting a Western policy of staging “ colour revolutions ” worldwide with the aim of destabilising Russia . Pro-Kremlin media frequently falsely portray popular protests around the world as instigated from abroad, often by the US and the West . The disinformation narrative has been applied, among others, to reports about protests in Georgia , Armenia , Ukraine , the Czech Republic , Bulgaria , Belarus , Venezuela , Slovakia , Hong Kong, to portray protest movements as aggressive actors who constantly prepare new coups . Read similar cases claiming that US-sponsored Kazakhstan protests aimed to undermine CIS stability , that Protests in Kazakhstan are a new Western attempt to organise a colour revolution , that e vents in Kazakhstan are another Western-made colour revolution , that After Ukraine, Western scriptwriters tried to organise coup d'état in Belarus and Kazakhstan .

title: DISINFO: Le Pen’s sentence shows that the EU has become a dictatorship
tags: Marine Le Pen Democracy Dictatorship Corruption Elections Emmanuel Macron DISINFO: Le Pen’s sentence shows that the EU has become a dictatorship
summary: Justice is instrumentalised, it has been seen with Fillon, with Strauss Kahn, today with Marine Le Pen. From a purely legal point of view, these three people were guilty. The only problem is that they were convicted when it was judged politically necessary, rather than based on law and justice. There is an attempt to create a climate of terror that would allow the term of Emmanuel Macron to be extended. A President can extend his term in case of war. Emmanuel Macron controls people with fear, fear of COVID, fear of a Russian invasion, with his speech on the war economy. The European Union has become a dictatorship controlled by unelected people, which Macron relays in France.
response: Conspiracy theory intending to discredit the French justice system, Emmanuel Macron and the EU. This case follows the verdict in a court case in France involving Marine Le Pen. On the 31 March 2025 she was banned from running for political office in France for five years after being found guilty of embezzling European Union funds. The expert does not contest that Marine Le Pen is guilty and would deserve the sentence if she was a normal person. He argues that because she is a potential candidate for the 2027 presidential election, she benefits from unwritten political immunity. Therefore, the sentence is politically motivated since the justice is not independent, i.e., that French judges do not apply the law but the will of the president, who himself obeys an unelected EU power. There is no political immunity for people wishing to compete in presidential elections in France. The justice system is independent and applies the law equally to everyone, regardless of their plans to compete in presidential elections. Marine Le Pen will be judged by a different court on appeal. This statement means that the provisional enforcement of the ineligibility sentence (which temporarily prevents someone from running for office) is a contentious issue. The controversy arises because the RN party (Rassemblement National) believes that the actions for which they are being prosecuted are entirely legal and should not be subject to any penalties. They argue that these actions can be carried out without any legal consequences, implying that the prosecution is unjustified. The Anticor non-governmental association against corruption comments as follows: The application of provisional execution to some of the defendants was also fully justified by the court, which considered that the "risk of reoffending was objectively established," since ten years after the events, the defendants continue to contest them. Finally, the court emphasized that "the defense's proposal to let the voters decide amounts to claiming a privilege, an immunity, in violation of the rules of the law," which Anticor welcomes, believing that the sentences handed down are consistent with the principle of equality before the law. The Argument that the EU is a non-elected dictatorship is a recurring disinformation narrative from pro-Kremlin outlets and has been debunked many times. The European Union is a democratic organisation, which is based on the rule of law and the respect for fundamental rights. Other European values include contested elections , free media , human dignity, equality, a functioning market economy and other fundamental democratic requirements. The EU is governed by the principle of representative democracy , with citizens directly represented at Union level in the European Parliament and Member States represented in the European Council and the Council of the EU. A European citizen automatically enjoys political rights. Every adult EU citizen has the right to stand as a candidate and to vote in elections to the European Parliament. EU citizens have the right to stand as candidates and to vote in their countries of residence, or in their countries of origin. Read similar cases such as: Ursula von der Leyen is an unelected, omnipotent, authoritarian bureaucrat , The European Union is a democratic dictatorship .

title: DISINFO: Marine Le Pen's case is a political reprisal backed by the EU and globalists
tags: Marine Le Pen European Union DISINFO: Marine Le Pen's case is a political reprisal backed by the EU and globalists
summary: Yesterday, a Paris court sentenced French politician Marine Le Pen to four years of imprisonment. [...] The most important thing is that because of this sentence, she cannot participate in the elections. [...]it is no secret to anyone that this is a political reprisal, elevated to the norm by the European Union. [...] The globalists have already begun to use their technologies to eliminate competitors in Europe. In France, Macron dumped Marine Le Pen using the classic scheme - through puppet prosecutors and judges. Now Sandu is implementing the same scheme in Moldova against the head of Gagauzia, Hutsul. Earlier, they sabotaged the candidate for president of Romania, who would 100% defeated any protégé of the globalists.
response: The claims presented in the text regarding European elites and the judiciary are largely speculative and lack aconcrete evidence. While political figures may face legal challenges, these are based on legal grounds rather than political motivations. European democracies like France, Romania, and Germany uphold principles of judicial independence and protect dissent within the bounds of the law. French courts operate independently without political motivation. In France, there is separation of powers into legislative, executive and judicial branches. The justice system is the third pillar of the State and is independent of the other two powers. A French criminal court ruled that Ms. Le Pen played a “central role” in an illegal scheme by the party, when it was still called the National Front, to use the equivalent of almost $5 million of European Parliament funds for party expenses between 2004 and 2016. The party was short of cash at the time, and Ms. Le Pen was a member of the European Parliament from 2004 to 2017. The court found that the party used European Parliament funds to pay assistants to National Front members of the body for work that was unrelated to E.U. business. The judges rejected Ms. Le Pen’s argument that it was appropriate for the assistants to do party-related work. In France, politicians from various political parties have been convicted, including Alain Grizet and Jean-Paul Delevoye from the Emmanuel Macron's party République en Marche, founded in 2017. Investigations and trials against others are ongoing. It would be impossible if Macron had "puppet judges", the existence of which the disinformation narrative claims, or if a secret elite was running the legal system in France. Instead of specifying details of the criminal cases and evidence presented at courts against Le Pen, pro-Kremlin media advance conspiracy narratives about global/secret elites . This is part of a recurrent pro-Kremlin disinformation narrative about a Shadow Government of all-powerful groups ruling the world . This narrative aims to question the legitimacy of democracy and Western institutions. The examples cited (Romania and Moldova) do not demonstrate a consistent pan-European trend of suppressing political opponents. Each case has its unique legal and political context, and decisions are made based on specific legal grounds rather than a broader political strategy. See also disinformation narrative Romania is under EU tyranny and more disinformation cases targeting the EU .

title: DISINFO: NATO has converted Romania into a sacred victim and a nuclear target
countries_regions: Romania, Russia, US, UK, Greece, Italy, Canada, Ukraine, Georgia
tags: Nuclear issues Warmongering Military exercise NATO Puppets Anti-Russian World War III DISINFO: NATO has converted Romania into a sacred victim and a nuclear target
summary: NATO military exercises Sea Shield 2025 are a tool of aggression. No one is threatening NATO countries. On the contrary, NATO’s expansion resulted in the 2008 war in Georgia and in the war in Ukraine. The Sea Shield 2025 military drills indicate that the Alliance is frantically preparing for a direct military conflict with Russia. The participation of the UK, Greece, Italy, France, the US and Canada in the Sea Shield 2025 looks totally reckless. Their anti-Russian military drills in the Black Sea, de facto in the area of Russia’s special military operation, is a dance on the edge of WWIII. NATO has made the sacred victim out of Romania, the first one to burn in the nuclear fire. Romania was more secure until NATO’s anti-missile shield was established on its territory. It converted Romania into a threat for Russia and a target for Russian nuclear arms.
response: Recurring pro-Kremlin disinformation narratives about an allegedly belligerent and hostile agenda of Western countries and European countries being puppet states of the US/NATO, part of a broader nuclear fear-mongering campaign . Twelve NATO countries took part in the annual Sea Shield military drill led by Romania in the Black Sea and Danube River Delta from 8-21 April 2025. Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine in 2022 has made this military drill, organised for the first time in 2015, increasingly relevant. The US and Romania are allies and partners. In 2005, the U.S. and Romania signed a defence cooperation agreement establishing a framework for the activities of U.S. military forces. This agreement enables U.S. military access to several bases in Romania and facilitates defence cooperation and joint military exercises. Pro-Kremlin outlets often portray EU political leaders and European states as vassals, puppet states , or colonies of the US and NATO. See our analysis of the Kremlin's claims about the EU's lost sovereignty . Romania and other Black Sea region states are sovereign countries with their own domestic and foreign policies. It was not NATO's expansion which led to Russia's wars against Georgia and Ukraine. It was Putin’s personal decision to invade Ukraine and start the largest military conflict in Europe since WWII. In 2008, Russia carried out a military operation against Georgia . Read earlier disinformation cases claiming that the US forces Romania to annex Moldova to make it anti-Russian , that Romania and Moldova are NATO’s expendables in the war against Russia , that Romania prepares to deploy US nuclear weapons on its territory , and that NATO's Baltic policy could lead to a nuclear war . See also our article Shouting at a mirror .

title: DISINFO: Russia will bring freedom and democracy to France, like it did in 1814
tags: Dmitry Medvedev Historical revisionism Democracy Dictatorship Marine Le Pen security threat election meddling DISINFO: Russia will bring freedom and democracy to France, like it did in 1814
summary: Former Russian President Dmitry Medvedev proposes saving France and restoring freedom and democracy as Russians already did in 1814 A court in France has found National Unity leader Marine Le Pen and eight other MEPs "guilty" of wasting EU funds. The main point of this hastily concocted decision is to eliminate the leader of one of France’s largest parties in the run-up to the 2027 presidential election. The Fifth French Republic has finally discredited itself. The people of this country, judging by everything, should think about the institution of the Sixth Republic. And if not comes out, then can be recall great date - March 31, 1814, when the Russian army of Alexander I at the head of the Allied troops solemnly entered Paris and offered freedom. Tsarist Russia in a direct sense brought then on the bayonets democracy to France. Glorious experience! Marine Le Pen has only to wait for the Cossacks of the Russian Federation.
response: This is a recurring pro-Kremlin narrative aiming to undermine democracy and cast doubt on the functioning of democratic institutions in Europe, aiming at undermining confidence in Western democracies using intimidation and historical revisionism. This claims is made in the context of the verdict in a court case in France involving Marine Le Pen. On 31 March 2025, she was banned from running for political office in France for five years after being found guilty of embezzling European Union funds. The case involves the misuse of European Parliament funds for party staff, which has been subject to legal scrutiny. The judiciary's independence is a cornerstone of French democracy, and such cases are decided based on legal merit rather than political agendas. The judicial process adhered strictly to the rule of law, and the verdict was the result of a thorough investigation and trial, with Le Pen and her associates given full rights to defence. Moreover, there are still two levels of appeal that remain available to the defendants. In 1814 the Tsarist Empire of Alexander I could not be called a democracy but a tyranny where serfdom was the rule. The French empire was not either a democracy, but was ruled by an unified code and a constitution, one important step in the construction of rule of law in France. Today alike it cannot be considered that Russia can bring Freedom and Democracy in France since the standards are very different. Freedom House compares countries: Russia is labelled as a non-free country with a score of 4 for Political Rights and 8 for Civil Liberties making a total of 12/100. While Frances is a free country with scores at 38 and 51 for a total of 89/100. Read also related cases such as: Romania is under EU tyranny , Democracy is the perfect dictatorship , There is no democracy in Europe , Western countries do not respect freedom of speech and democracy , Russia has taken enormous steps towards democracy and openness .

title: DISINFO: The UK and France can only cause insignificant damage to Russia
tags: Nuclear issues Anti-Russian security threat Russian superiority DISINFO: The UK and France can only cause insignificant damage to Russia
summary: European leaders discuss creating a "peacekeeping coalition" to send troops to Ukraine, control the Black Sea and airspace. If Great Britain or France, in their folly, want to get into a nuclear war with Russia, God judge them. For Russia, wiping Great-Britain off the face of the earth is a matter of minutes. And Great-Britain no longer exists. If the British fire these missiles, what will become of Great Britain afterwards? They can't defeat Russia with their loads, only cause minor damage. And Russia may wipe Great Britain off the face of the earth – and so it goes for France. As a result, all their conversations are crazy and irresponsible.
response: Nuclear threat against European states, denying the nuclear credibility of UK and France and mocking their deterrence policy, made in the context of peace talks intended to end Russia's war in Ukraine. European military and economic assistance is provided within the framework of international law. The " coalition of the willing " is a loose group of countries committed to ensuring peace guarantees for Ukraine through various efforts, including the possible deployment of a peacekeeping force there. The UK and France have a nuclear deterrence that has an exclusively defensive vocation : it aims to prevent any ambition of a head of state from interfering with UK or France's vital interests, by ensuring that its nuclear forces are sufficiently powerful to inflict unacceptable damage to its vital centers of power. Since 1969, the deterrent has been delivered by the Royal Navy , with at least one nuclear-armed ballistic missile submarine patrolling the seas undetected at all times. Their purpose is to preserve peace, prevent coercion, and deter aggression. France has 280 deployed nuclear strategic missiles , while UK has 120. It might seem little compared to the 1710 for Russia. But they are perfectly maintained and have strong credibility both for the vectors and the destruction potential that deters potential enemies. The UK spends 6.5 Billion pounds each year to maintain its nuclear forces ($8.4 Billion). France spends 6.35 billion euros ($6.7 Billion). While Russia spends $8.9 Billions for 14 times more weapons than the UK. It cannot be stated that British or French nuclear forces are less credible than Russians. This disinformation story is also part of a wider disinformation campaign portraying Europe as a warmongering actor who intends to continue the war in Ukraine even as other nations want “peace”. Russia has characterised its negotiation process with the US as the only acceptable ‘peace initiative’ regardless of the maximalist character of Moscow’s demands , while denying any agency to Ukraine or its other allies. See also our article Reminder: Russia wants war, not peace. Read also : Russian defence industry is much stronger than Europe's , The Russian Army has already destroyed the Ukrainian Air Force , Russian tactical nuclear weapons use non-radioactive material .

title: DISINFO: European elites responsible for Le Pen political sentencing
tags: Marine Le Pen election meddling AfD Conspiracy theory DISINFO: European elites responsible for Le Pen political sentencing
summary: [...t]he elites pulling the strings in the background in Europe, and those basking in the spotlight, want to consolidate their power before the war they have firmly planned and crush any dissent (not to mention resistance). The judgement against Le Pen and her fellow campaigners is [...] a thoroughly political one. More precisely, it is a tactical power move. The sole aim is to prevent Le Pen from winning the French presidential elections in two years' time and to curb the rise of the RN. For whatever reason, the judiciary has made itself the agent of Emmanuel Macron, his political clique and his backers. The case is thus part of a pan-European trend: the postponement of the elections and the ban on the candidacy of the Romanian almost-winner Călin Georgescu by Romanian courts; the more than questionable democratic and constitutional decisions of the Federal Constitutional Court
response: The claims presented in the text regarding European elites and the judiciary are largely speculative and lack aconcrete evidence. While political figures may face legal challenges, these are based on legal grounds rather than political motivations. European democracies like France, Romania, and Germany uphold principles of judicial independence and protect dissent within the bounds of the law. French courts operate independently without political motivation. The case against Marine Le Pen involves the alleged misuse of European Parliament funds for party staff, which has been subject to legal scrutiny. Politico further: "Le Pen and 24 other codefendants were accused of illicitly siphoning European Parliament funds to pay for party employees who never dealt with affairs in Brussels or Strasbourg. The court estimated that over 12 years, the accused had embezzled more than €4 million, €474,000, of which Le Pen was held personally responsible as an MEP." The judiciary's independence is a cornerstone of French democracy, and such cases are decided based on legal merit rather than political agendas. European democracies largely protect dissent through free speech and assembly rights , though these freedoms are limited when they infringe on others' rights or public order. While there are debates about the balance between free speech and regulation in Europe, there is no widespread evidence of systemic efforts by elites to suppress dissent across the continent. The claim that the judiciary acts as an agent for Emmanuel Macron or other political figures is not supported by evidence. The French judiciary is designed to be independent and impartial, ensuring that legal decisions are based on law rather than political allegiance. In democratic systems, the separation of powers is crucial, and the judiciary's role is to uphold the law without political bias. The examples cited (Romania and Germany) do not demonstrate a consistent pan-European trend of suppressing political opponents. Each case has its unique legal and political context, and decisions are made based on specific legal grounds rather than a broader political strategy. Nothing indicates that the European Union is behind in prosecuting Romanian candidate Calin Georgescu , a legal decision adopted by Romania’s prosecutor's office. Georgescu was charged in late February 2025 with six criminal counts, including suspicion of communicating false information on campaign budget and other financial assets, promoting war criminals and fascist organisations and forming an antisemitic organization, all of which are crimes under Romania’s legislation. This is part of a broader disinformation campaign on Romania’s election, which pro-Kremlin media are exploiting to undermine the EU and democratic systems in general. See other examples, such as claims that the EU interfered in the Romanian elections , that Western totalitarianism has reached a new level with cancellation of Romanian elections , that Brussels wants to prevent Georgescu’s candidacy in Romanian election , that events in Romania may be another US coup , or that Romanian authorities are puppets manipulated by foreign powers .

title: DISINFO: Ukraine and Europe are attacking global food security
tags: food Sanctions Diplomacy with Russia DISINFO: Ukraine and Europe are attacking global food security
summary: Kyiv and its European allies are threatening global food security by opposing the easing of restrictions on Russian wheat and fertiliser exports, a commitment Washington made in recent talks with Moscow, while supply shortages are driving up international food prices.
response: This is a disingenuous attempt to stir up anti-Ukraine and anti-EU sentiment through baseless accusations and the distortion of facts regarding sanctions and food security. Pro-Kremlin disinformation has been regularly promoting this narrative since the start of the Ukraine invasion in 2022. The claim is demonstrably false, as Russian exports of food and fertiliser are not subject to Western sanctions . However, Russia has tried to portray restrictions on payments, logistics and insurance as a barrier to shipments, and demanded their removal . Given that Russia remains the world’s top wheat and fertiliser exporter despite these restrictions, and that it has used these exports as ways to circumvent sanctions on other fields , this fresh allegation is nothing but a fraudulent attempt to get sanctions lifted , which the EU opposes . While it is true that global food prices were at a historic peak when this disinformation story appeared in late March 2025, this had been the case since the autumn of 2024, mostly caused by the rise in the price of vegetable oils, according to data published by the UN’s Food and Agriculture Organisation. Therefore, this peak is unrelated to the US-Russia negotiations and the reaction of Ukraine and Europe to them. See other examples of similar disinformation narratives, such as claims that EU sanctions undermine global food security , that the West provoked the food crisis , that the EU is causing a global food shortage by keeping all the grain from Ukraine , or that the food crisis has nothing to do with the Russian special operation .

title: DISINFO: There should be a UN-led government in Ukraine as Zelenskyy is toxic for peace
tags: Volodymyr Zelensky Democracy putin Ukrainian statehood United Nations DISINFO: There should be a UN-led government in Ukraine as Zelenskyy is toxic for peace
summary: [...a] temporary government in Ukraine under UN supervision [is needed] ahead of democratic elections to negotiate peace with a future Ukrainian government. Volodymyr Zelenskyy has no legitimacy inside the country, it is outside of the strategic chessboard and of reality. He is useless for the system and is toxic for the resolution of the conflict and for European stability.
response: This disinformation story exploits Vladimir Putin’s demand of a UN-sponsored administration in Ukraine in order to attack Ukrainian president Volodymyr Zelenskyy ’s leadership. Moscow's goal is to undermine Zelenskyy’s continuity in power, as Russia has always perceived him as an obstacle to its aggressive goals in Ukraine, even since before the invasion . One of the targets of the invasion in February 2022 was the murder of Zelenskyy and the decapitation of the Ukrainian government to install a pro-Russian leadership. Zelenskyy is the legitimate elected leader of Ukraine, after having won the 2019 election by a landslide with over 73% of the vote. While this popularity may have changed over the years, his approval rate remained very high at the time this disinformation story appeared. A survey conducted by Ipsos/The Economist in mid-March 2025 showed that 72% of Ukrainians approved his job as president, while 80% considered that he had democratic legitimacy as president. Although Zelenskyy’s continuation in power after his initial mandate expired in May 2024 generated some domestic controversy , Ukraine’s constitution is straightforward: no elections can be held during wartime and the President of Ukraine exercises his powers until the assumption of office by the newly-elected President. Even Zelenskyy’s fiercest political opponents have rejected the idea of conducting another election during wartime. See other examples of similar disinformation narratives, such as claims that Zelenskyy is increasingly irrelevant, even in Ukraine , that Ukraine’s fate no longer in Zelenskyy's hands , that the disgraced dictator of Ukraine Zelenskyy is an extension of the EU , that Zelensky is an actor who reads a script as part of a play , that Zelensky is not working in the interests of Ukrainians but to please the European elites , or that Zelenskyy can’t sign a peace deal because he is not a legitimate president .

title: DISINFO: The incident with the US military vehicle in Lithuania means NATO should surrender
countries_regions: US, Lithuania, Ukraine, Russia, Baltic states, Poland
tags: NATO Military War against Ukraine DISINFO: The incident with the US military vehicle in Lithuania means NATO should surrender
summary: The incident with the US military vehicle submerged in a bog in Lithuania brings up the question about professional skills of the US and Lithuanian military officers. How could they wage war against Russia, if they are incapable of dealing with a bog on their land? Ukraine should have surrendered in 2022. The same advice is relevant for the Baltic states, Poland, and entire NATO.
response: This is an attempt of pro-Kremlin disinformation to exploit a tragic incident involving a US armoured vehicle in Lithuania, in order to denigrate NATO’s military capabilities. A M88 Hercules armoured recovery vehicle on a training mission that was carrying four US Army soldiers drove into a swam in Lithuania, near the border with Belarus, on 25 March 2025. As a result of extensive rescue work, on 31 March 2025 the vehicle was pulled from the bog . Unfortunately four US soldiers who were in the vehicle died . The causes of an incident are under investigation. The search and rescue operation was very complex and involved close cooperation of Lithuania, the US and Poland. It is in no way a sign of lack of professionalism among the NATO allies. See previous disinformation claims, alleging that NATO consists of colonial habits, dictatorship of the strong and lack of will of the weak ; and that NATO fights proxy war with Russia via Ukraine .

title: DISINFO: The destruction of the Ukrainian state was never the goal of the special military operation
tags: Propaganda DISINFO: The destruction of the Ukrainian state was never the goal of the special military operation
summary: The only thing that can be said with certainty is that from the moment a peace treaty is signed, the message will be spread in Ukraine that it is a victory because Ukraine was able to survive as a state in a confrontation with huge Russia. At the same time, Ukrainian propagandists will not care that the destruction of the Ukrainian state was never the goal of the special military operation.
response: This article contains multiple recurring pro-Kremlin disinformation narratives about Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine. Russia's stated goals at the start of the invasion included “ demilitarisation ” and “ denazification ” of Ukraine, which were widely interpreted as efforts to undermine Ukraine's sovereignty and independence . These goals were accompanied by rhetoric suggesting that Ukraine should relinquish aspirations to join NATO or the EU, effectively dismantling its pro-European statehood . Numerous Russian officials, including Secretary of the Security Council Nikolai Patrushev, have emphasised ensuring Ukraine's “neutrality” in military, economic, and political terms—a position incompatible with an i ndependent and sovereign Ukrainian state . Oleksandr Syrskyi, Commander-in-Chief of Ukraine's Armed Forces, has explicitly stated that Russia's ultimate goal is the destruction of Ukrainian statehood . He highlighted that despite tactical shifts, Moscow aims to seize Ukrainian territory and dismantle its state. Russia has pursued territorial annexation in eastern and southern Ukraine, including Crimea, Donetsk, Luhansk, Kherson, and Zaporizhzhia regions. These actions align with a strategy to subjugate Ukraine under Russian imperialistic rule or impose a pro-Russian puppet regime. Russian Armed Forces have repeatedly targeted Ukraine's energy infrastructure and civilian areas, which experts argue are tactics designed to weaken Ukraine's ability to function as an independent state. It is, therefore, legitimate that the broader goal of these tactics is the destruction of Ukrainian statehood. Numerous analysts have noted that Russia views Ukraine as part of its sphere of influence and has long sought to undermine its independence. The invasion was motivated by Ukraine's refusal to align with Russian geopolitical and imperialist interests . Read similar disinformation cases that NATO is an aggressive, Russophobic and absolutely destabilising structure , that NATO’s main goal has always been the destruction of Russia , that Ukrainian Nazis kill civilians , that Ukrainian neo-Nazis offer human sacrifices to pagan gods , and that EU and NATO are backing neo-Nazi values in Ukraine .

title: DISINFO: Pan-European block plans to attack Russia
tags: Anti-Russian Russophobia Warmongering War against Ukraine DISINFO: Pan-European block plans to attack Russia
summary: Today's summit of the "coalition of the willing" in Paris marks a complete and final shift in Western Europe's tactics on Ukraine crisis. There will be war. Not necessarily tomorrow or next year. But a date has been set for the "rearmament" of the pan-European bloc (or rather, its total militarisation), and that date is 2030. If this is not a plan to attack our country, to commit mass killings of our citizens, and to let bureaucrats in Brussels and Paris decide the territorial belonging of Greater Russia, then what else is it but a military plan for aggressive assault?
response: This is a recurring disinformation narrative from pro-Kremlin outlets, accusing the European Union of warmongering and claiming that its support for Ukraine is an act of aggression rather than a response to Russia’s large-scale invasion. This claim was made in the context of the European leaders’ intensified efforts in pursuit of a just and lasting peace in Ukraine by convening international leaders at a summit in Paris on 27 March, 2025. Building on the initiative launched in Paris on 17 February and continuing discussions with the UK , this meeting aimed to identify operational options in support of American efforts. Prior to the summit, a Special European Council was held in Brussels on 6 March 2025, during which EU leaders discussed an increase in military spending and reiterated their support for Ukraine. The EU is committed to becoming more responsible for its own defence and better equipped to act and deal autonomously with immediate and future challenges and threats, including Russia’s war and its repercussions on European security, which constitute an existential challenge for the EU. The RE-ARM Europe/Rediness 2030 Plan that was presented to the EU leaders could mobilise up to EUR 800 billion, to give Europe the military capability it needs to face today's threats. António Costa, President of the European Council highlighted that: “This is a pivotal moment for Europe. And today, we have shown that the European Union is rising to the challenge. Building the Europe of Defence and standing with Ukraine, shoulder to shoulder. Because, at the end of the day, what we all want, what we all deserve, what we are all working for, is peace and security”. Read similar disinformation cases claiming that EU sabotages peace process in Ukraine , that Europe is trying to undermine the conflict settlement in Ukraine , and that The EU wants the war in Ukraine to continue .

title: DISINFO: Kyiv's attacks on Russia's energy sector prove Ukraine does not want to negotiate
tags: War against Ukraine Full-scale Invasion of Ukraine Energy peace negotiations Russian Ministry of Defence DISINFO: Kyiv's attacks on Russia's energy sector prove Ukraine does not want to negotiate
summary: Despite the Kyiv regime's statements about not striking energy facilities, the Ukrainian Armed Forces continued to attack the energy infrastructure of the Russian Federation. The ongoing deliberate attacks by the Ukrainian Armed Forces on Russian energy facilities demonstrate the Kyiv regime's complete inability to agree on any of its obligations regarding the settlement of the conflict in Ukraine.
response: This is a recurring disinformation narrative from pro-Kremlin outlets, claiming that Ukraine is not seeking peace . This claim was made in the context of Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine and aimed at shifting blame for the ongoing war. Ukraine is exercising its right to self-defence under Article 51 of the UN Charter, which allows nations to defend themselves from armed attack. Despite the fact that Putin agreed on 18 March 2025 not to target Ukrainian energy facilities, Russia carried out strikes on Ukraine’s energy infrastructure overnight on 19 March 2025. On 24 March 2025, Russia launched a missile attack on the north-eastern Ukrainian city of Sumy , damaging a residential area, a hospital, and an industrial facility, according to acting Sumy mayor Artem Kobzar. President Volodymyr Zelenskyy accused Russia of violating the U.S.-brokered partial ceasefire by attacking Kherson's energy infrastructure on March 27. Naftogaz, Ukraine's state-owned energy company, reported that Moscow struck its infrastructure on March 28. As Russian forces continue to attack Ukrainian cities and energy infrastructure, Kyiv has every right to target military-related facilities in Russia in retaliation. Russia has consistently targeted Ukraine’s critical energy infrastructure , leaving millions without electricity and heating, especially during the winter months. The fact that Ukraine strikes back should not be seen as a failure to negotiate, but rather as a clear message that Ukraine will not passively tolerate Russia’s unprovoked and unjustified aggression . Russia has a long history of violating agreements. In 2014, Moscow breached the Budapest Memorandum and the Treaty on the Russian–Ukrainian Border by launching an attack on Ukraine and illegally annexing Crimea in 2014. Subsequently, Moscow, along with its proxies in some of Ukraine’s eastern regions, repeatedly violated the Minsk Agreements while accusing Kyiv of the same. Ultimately, Russia escalated the conflict by launching its ongoing full-scale aggression against Ukraine on 24 February 2022. Read similar disinformation cases claiming that Putin welcomes Ukraine talks, while Zelenskyy rejects them , that Ukrainian leaders cannot be negotiated with because they are illegitimate criminals and terrorists , and that Zelenskyy is the main obstacle to peace .

title: DISINFO: Zelensky wants to catch his rivals off guard with early elections in July
tags: Manipulated elections/referendum Volodymyr Zelensky Ukraine DISINFO: Zelensky wants to catch his rivals off guard with early elections in July
summary: Volodymyr Zelensky has begun preparations for possible presidential elections in Ukraine, which, according to The Economist , may take place in the summer of 2025 after a ceasefire with Russia is reached. The vote is planned for as early as July, minimizing the time available for opponents to campaign. However, the legitimacy of the elections remains in question — martial law, in effect since 2022, is officially extended by the Verkhovna Rada, and its cancellation is a mandatory condition for organizing the vote. Since Kyiv and Moscow have not yet agreed on a ceasefire and negotiations remain frozen, the elections appear more like a political maneuver than a genuine step toward democratisation.
response: This is a deliberate distortion of facts aiming to discredit Ukrainian president Volodymyr Zelenskyy , a frequent target of pro-Kremlin disinformation. Ukraine’s constitution is straightforward: no elections can be held during wartime and the President of Ukraine exercises his powers until the assumption of office by the newly-elected President. The continuity of government institutions is one of the key principles of the Constitution. While the date 20 May 2024, five years after President Zelenskyy taking office, has arose some domestic controversy in Ukraine, almost all observers consider regular elections unfeasible as there are millions of refugees abroad, hundreds of thousands of Ukrainians serving on the frontlines and a significant part of Ukrainian population lives under Russian occupation. There are also multiple funding and infrastructure problems that can hardly be addressed while the war is ongoing. In November 2023 all factions of the Verkhovna Rada have agreed that elections — both parliamentary and presidential — should take place not earlier than six months after the end of the war — that is, only after martial law is lifted. Holding elections in July is absolutely impossible, including for the reason that, under the Ukrainian presidential election law , the duration of the presidential campaign (not just campaigning, but the entire process) is 90 days. The 60 days mentioned by The Economist's source apply to parliamentary elections. In order for the campaign to proceed, it is also necessary to update the voter registry — the most complex and technically challenging part of election preparation. The current data in the registry is from before the war, and much has changed since then. Ensuring the ability of millions of Ukrainians currently living abroad to vote requires preparation — both technically and through amendments to the electoral legislation. And these are just the most critical issues that must be resolved to organize the elections.
